description: Add 1-card Quick Answer mode to Ask a Question. Spread chooser UI on entry page (Story Mode / Quick Answer). URL param ?spread=quick wired through draw page to result. Position-driven rendering: card.position replaces positions[idx] for labels and text-key lookup. Takeaway panel skipped for quick mode. Subtitle uses existing spreadQuick i18n key. Phase stylesheets added to th/question.html and th/question-draw.html.
notes: getFullInterpretationText quick branch kept as defensive fallback (dead code for question flow but harmless). questionSpread module var resets to story on page reload — sessionStorage persistence deferred.
